# pip-audit ignore file — each entry is one vulnerability ID to suppress.
# Every entry MUST carry a dated rationale comment on the line(s) directly
# above it. Remove entries when the fix is published and the dependency
# can be upgraded.

# PYSEC-2026-2270 (python-dotenv 1.2.1, fix 1.2.2): python-dotenv is used
